title: CG Vyapam – Sub Auditor – 69 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CG Vyapam Sub Auditor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 69 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Chhattisgarh Vyavsayik Pariksha Mandal (CG Vyapam) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 69 Sub Auditor. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 29-04-2026, and closes on 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CG Vyapam website, vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in/.
basic_details.organization_name: Office of Commissioner Cooperative & Registrar, Cooperative Institutions, Chhattisgarh

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree from a recognized university

selection_process: Written Examination (OMR Based MCQ - 100 Questions, 100 Marks, 2 Hours)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the CG Vyapam portal at https://vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 29-04-2026 to 22-05-2026 (5:00 PM). First-time applicants must complete Profile Registration (Panjikaran) on the Vyapam portal - once registered, candidates need not re-enter personal information for future exams. After completing profile registration, candidates must pay the examination fee online and click the “SUBMIT” button to finalize the application.
seo_tags: Chhattisgarh Vyavsayik Pariksha Mandal Sub Auditor Recruitment 2026
